title: The Wawa Pack
description: Create, navigate, tinker, and fight! The silly, magical Create and Exploration / Adventure-centric modpack with flare (and origins!) :>
body:
## The silly, magical Create and Exploration / Adventure-centric modpack! ### This description will serve as both a summary and guide to the pack! #### Exploration and adventure encouraged with mods like Nature's Compass and Waystones! - Many biome mods like Terrestria, Terralith, and Promenade - New and improved structures in the Overworld with mods like CTOV, Explorify, and Towns and Towers - Nether and End changes via BetterNether, Amplified Nether, and BetterEnd - An enhanced underground experience via YUNG's mods and Spelunkery - Lootr to make the multiplayer adventure experience smoother - Traveler's Backpack and other mods to make inventory management easier
Exploration Gallery WIP, currently empty!

#### Don't forget about combat! This pack offers mods like Combat Roll, BetterCombat, Simply Swords, etc! - Better Combat, a very improved and more nuanced approach to combat mechanics - Simply Swords; many new weapon types and ways to fight - More Bows: Restrung, if you prefer to fight ranged - Combat Roll, an interesting movement mechanic for combat with enchantments and upgrades - Immersive Armors for your defensive and style
Combat Gallery WIP, currently empty!

#### Tons of new building materials from the likes of Chipped, Adorn, Twigs, and more! - Chipped, Stoneworks, Create, etc for all your block palette needs - Adorn, Beautify, Hearth and Home, etc for all your furnishings - Many interesting wood and stone types to experiment with
Building Gallery WIP, currently empty!

#### Featuring many tech mods like Create, ComputerCraft, AE2, and more! - Create and many of its addons - Deep Mob Learning: Refabricated (Different way to obtain mob loot) - CC: Tweaked with Create integration (Turtles, Lua, etc) - EnderChests and Tanks (Ender chest color coding!)

#### An enhanced and (somewhat) optimized experience! - Sodium, FerriteCore, Lithium, etc to help performance - Mods like AuthMe and Cherished Worlds for QoL - ImmediatelyFast, C2ME, and Chunky to improve rendering - Mods like AmbientSounds, CaveDust, Charmonium, etc help atmosphere - NotEnoughAnimations and BetterCombat make players more animated - Xaero's Minimap and World Map to both help find your place and mark locations - More Mob Variants and dynamic world generation to make the world feel more alive - Roughly Enough Items, Resources, and more to help you find and create easily - Mods like Global Packs to help customize your experience

Other fun mods: - Origins and Extra Origins - Joy of Painting - Grappling Hook Mod - Icarus (Wings!) - Cosmetica - Target Dummy (Shows hp!) - Useful Slime (Slime items like tinker's construct) - Windchimes - Wormhole (Portals!) Other QoL and tweaks: - Mouse Wheelie - Carry On (Carry block entities) - ClickThrough (Click through signs to inventories) - CraftPresence (Customizable!) - Elytra Slot (Elytra Trinket) - Logical Zoom - Move Boats (With crouch-right click) - Bed Is Not Too Far Away - Bad Wither No Cookie ---
Permissions - You are not allowed to distribute this modpack on other sites without my permission
- You may use this modpack as inspiration or take elements to your own projects
- Please do not claim this modpack as your own
- You may and are encouraged to play with friends or share it
- All rights reserved unless stated otherwise
### Recommended Client RAM: **5-6 GB** | Recommended Server RAM: **~6 GB**
